# private

**Type Property**

The standard option to always redact the interpolated value.

## Declaration

```swift
static var `private`: OSLogPrivacy { get }
```

## Discussion

When it redacts a value, the system displays a generic string in place of the value. If you want to correlate log messages that contain the same value, use the [doc://com.apple.os/documentation/os/OSLogPrivacy/private(mask:)] function to create a structure with the [doc://com.apple.os/documentation/os/OSLogPrivacy/Mask/hash] mask.

## Getting the Privacy Options

- **auto**: The standard option to let the system determine whether to redact or display a value.
- **public**: The standard option to always show the interpolated value.
- **sensitive**: The option to always redact interpolated values that contain sensitive information.
